codeReview.summary: The feature correctly extends the checked-in divergence registry to cover the canonical token-price offline-runtime 200-vs-503 mismatch, regenerates the diff report so the token-price case moves into expectedFindings beside simple-price, and adds focused regression coverage for the paired classification behavior.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 28d0a401bb785d76b51324f7a48de2755423f263, divergence registry, regenerated diff report, and targeted diff-report test. The token-price runtime mismatch is now registered as an expected divergence and no longer appears in actionable findings. No blocking or non-blocking review issues found.
